name: get_feishu_image_resource
description: Downloads an image resource from Feishu by its media ID and returns binary image data. To get the mediaId, extract block.image.token from an image block (block_type=27) returned by get_feishu_document_blocks.

mediaId.description:
Image media token (required). Obtain from one of:
1. An image block returned by get_feishu_document_blocks: block.image.token (block_type=27)
2. Response of upload_and_bind_image_to_block: fileToken field

extra.description: Extra query parameter for the Feishu media download API (optional). Required only for encrypted images; omit for standard image blocks.
